title: rubus oblongo-obovatus
intro: Rubus oblongo-obovatus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan bramble, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. The plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly its leaves, which are used in traditional medicine to treat fever, diarrhea, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Rubus oblongo-obovatus include antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to boost the immune system and protect against various diseases. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
